nasb.text: Behold, I have made him a witness to the peoples, A leader and commander for the peoples.

esv.text: Behold, I made him a witness to the peoples, a leader and commander for the peoples.

cnv.text: 看哪！我已經立了他作萬族的見證人， 為萬族的首領和司令。

ccb.text: 我使他统管万民， 向万民做见证。

csbs.text: 看哪！我已经使他作万民的见证人， 作万民的首领和发令者。
